summary: Verification contract items re-executed independently of the implementing Sonnet subagents: meeting-api 401 passed / 18 skipped (mixed-master concat-input invariance, media_files non-collapse, lane-id end-to-end propagation incl. lane_start_offset_ms, solo-lane auto-confirm, all-or-nothing fallback incl. unfinalized-lane and budget cases, lane:{key} correction-key compatibility, U.7 lane guard); vexa-bot tsc + build clean with BrowserLaneRecorderManager verified present in the injected window.VexaBrowserUtils wrapper; dashboard 73 passed. Three-stage tribunal adjudicated 23 findings (16 confirmed incl. 2 critical, 7 false positives); all 16 confirmed findings fixed and re-verified, HD-recorded under issue-25-audio-lanes. Remaining risk is operational, not code-level: real-meeting PoC (lane churn rate, label resolution quality, auto-confirm precision) is required before enabling RECORD_PARTICIPANT_LANES, which defaults to false.
